title: Intense Creamy Tunisian Chicken Wrap
description: A romantic, umami-packed wrap filled with tender chicken in a creamy yellow curry sauce, served in a corn husk for a low-carb twist.
instructions: Heat a skillet over medium heat and add 1 tablespoon olive oil.
Add minced garlic and diced onion, sauté until onions are translucent.
Stir in yellow curry paste and paprika, cooking until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add chicken cubes, browning them on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Pour in coconut milk, reduce heat to low, and let simmer for 15 minutes until chicken is cooked through.
Stir in low-fat Greek yogurt, lemon juice, salt, and pepper; gently heat until sauce is creamy, about 2 minutes, do not boil.
Warm corn husks over a dry skillet for 30 seconds to make them pliable.
Spoon the creamy chicken mixture onto each husk, sprinkle chopped cilantro, then fold the husk into a wrap.
Optional: For a crisp edge, place wrapped husks back in the skillet and toast lightly for 1 minute per side.
Serve immediately, garnished with extra cilantro and a squeeze of lemon.
